nasb.text: and those who use the world, as though they did not make full use of it; for the form of this world is passing away.

esv.text: and those who deal with the world as though they had no dealings with it. For the present form of this world is passing away.

cnv.text: 享用世上百物的要像沒有享用的一樣，因為這世上的情況都要過去。

ccb.text: 享用世界之物的，不要沉溺其中，因为现今的世界很快就要过去了。

csbs.text: 利用世界的，要像没有充分利用世界的；因为这世界的形态正在消逝。
